import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:5000/api';const apiClient=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Add token to requests
apiClient.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;});export const authAPI={register:data=>apiClient.post('/auth/register',data),login:data=>apiClient.post('/auth/login',data),logout:()=>apiClient.post('/auth/logout')};export const parkingSpotAPI={getAllSpots:filters=>apiClient.get('/parking-spots',{params:filters}),getSpotById:id=>apiClient.get("/parking-spots/".concat(id)),createSpot:data=>apiClient.post('/parking-spots',data),updateSpot:(id,data)=>apiClient.put("/parking-spots/".concat(id),data),deleteSpot:id=>apiClient.delete("/parking-spots/".concat(id)),addReview:(id,data)=>apiClient.post("/parking-spots/".concat(id,"/review"),data),seedDemoData:()=>apiClient.post('/seed')};export const bookingAPI={createBooking:data=>apiClient.post('/bookings',data),getBookings:()=>apiClient.get('/bookings'),getBookingById:id=>apiClient.get("/bookings/".concat(id)),updateBooking:(id,data)=>apiClient.put("/bookings/".concat(id),data),cancelBooking:(id,data)=>apiClient.post("/bookings/".concat(id,"/cancel"),data)};export const userAPI={getProfile:()=>apiClient.get('/users/profile'),updateProfile:data=>apiClient.put('/users/profile',data)};export default apiClient;
